assertions.name: the exact pinned upstream source builds without local modification
one daemon is the sole durable lifecycle writer

observed.result: CLI and daemon both mutate durable session storage

assertions.name: task containers cannot write shared Git metadata

observed.result: worktree resolution mounts the main repository and its Git metadata read-write

assertions.name: the supported extension surface can add Boss Man authority as a bounded product layer

limitations: This is reproducible exact-source stop evidence, not a runtime attempt to implement the Boss Man core fork; inspection evidence cannot be counted as a positive runtime hard-gate pass.

The candidate is stopped under the Phase 0 breadth rule: satisfying the missing invariants requires coordinated changes to storage authority, server routes, sandbox Git mounts, and top-level task navigation rather than an isolated module or supported plugin.

Because the candidate stopped before a Boss Man patch branch was created, there was no meaningful fork patch to rebase; the upstream-sync rehearsal was not run and is not represented as passing evidence.
Upstream Pi and pi-acp custody probes pass independently, so the stop does not imply that AoE or its ACP adapter is generally broken.
No upstream fork, patch, push, deployment, or production credential was created.
